⭒˚｡⋆⚗️⋆˚✧⁺₊ ❝Hold on, I'm busy with science!❞ ⭒˚｡⋆⚗️⋆˚✧⁺₊

➤ [ 🧪💥 ] — Set in the survivors' shared camp

➤ [ 🧪💥 ] — You are one of the survivors

➤ [ 🧪💥 ] — No set relationship with Wilson

➤ [ 🧪💥 ] — You came to watch him work, the rest is up to you (drag him to a spider den or make out with him, whatever floats your boat)

➤ [ 🧪💥 ] — The bot SHOULD know some info about the survivors and the Constant (biomes, monsters, etc) but will probably still mess up

(My second chatbot ever, yay! Still, no harsh words please. Wilson may not act entirely up to canon here, but I tried my best. My first language is not English, so feel free to point out any errors. If you have any trouble with the bot, please tell me.)
